subject: quran
title: Makharij basics - letter exit points
description: Learn the basic articulation points (makharij) for Arabic letters

subject: quran
title: Noon Sakinah rules
description: Learn when noon sakinah gets ghunnah (nasalization) vs idgham

subject: quran
title: Meem Sakinah rules
description: Learn the three rules of meem sakinah: idgham, ikhfa, izhar

subject: quran
title: Lam Shamsiyah and Qamariyah
description: Learn when lam is pronounced and when it is silent

subject: quran
title: Madd rules (elongation)
description: Learn the different types of madd and their durations (2, 4, 6 counts)

subject: quran
title: Rules of stopping (Waqf)
description: Learn where to pause and not pause during recitation

subject: quran
title: Qalqalah (echoing sound)
description: Learn qalqalah in letters Jeem, Ba, Dal, Ta, Qaf when sukoon is on them

subject: quran
title: Advanced tajweed application
description: Apply all tajweed rules fluently in continuous recitation

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah is the Creator
description: Show child the beauty of nature and say 'Allah made this' — building awareness of Creator

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah sees me and hears me
description: Teach child that Allah watches over us always — builds consciousness (taqwa)

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah is One (Tawheed)
description: Simple lesson: Allah is One, no partners. Say 'La ilaha illallah' together

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah sent the Quran
description: Teach that Allah's final book is the Quran, sent to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah sent many prophets
description: Learn that Allah sent prophets to guide people — starting with Adam

subject: islamic-studies
title: Angels are Allah's creation
description: Learn about Jibril, Mikail, Israfil, Azrael — angels do Allah's commands

subject: islamic-studies
title: The Four Holy Books
description: Learn: Taurat (Musa), Zaboor (Dawud), Injeel (Isa), Quran (Muhammad ﷺ)

subject: islamic-studies
title: Day of Judgment basics
description: People will be judged for their deeds — be ready by doing good

subject: islamic-studies
title: Predestination (Qadr)
description: Everything happens by Allah's will and wisdom — trust Allah

subject: islamic-studies
title: The Five Pillars overview
description: Shahada, Salah, Zakat, Sawm, Hajj — the foundation of Islam

subject: islamic-studies
title: Iman in detail
description: Deepen understanding of six articles of faith with Quranic evidence

subject: islamic-studies
title: Birth of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
description: Learn about the special night of the Prophet's birth in Makkah

subject: islamic-studies
title: Halimah the wet nurse
description: Young Muhammad ﷺ was cared for by Halimah in the desert

subject: islamic-studies
title: The young Prophet in Makkah
description: Childhood and youth of Prophet ﷺ — known as Al-Amin (the trustworthy)

subject: islamic-studies
title: Khadijah r.a. — first wife
description: Prophet ﷺ married Khadijah, a noble and supportive woman

subject: islamic-studies
title: Revelation in Cave Hira
description: Angel Jibril brought the first revelation: 'Iqra bismi rabbika' (Read!)

subject: islamic-studies
title: Early Muslims in Makkah
description: Learn about early believers: Abu Bakr, Ali, Zayd, Sumayyah r.a.

subject: islamic-studies
title: The Hijrah to Madinah
description: Prophet ﷺ migrated from Makkah to Madinah — the start of Islamic calendar

subject: islamic-studies
title: Life in Madinah
description: Building the mosque, brotherhood between Muhajireen and Ansar

subject: islamic-studies
title: Key battles: Badr and Uhud
description: Lessons from the early battles — trust in Allah and obedience

subject: islamic-studies
title: Conquest of Makkah
description: Peaceful return to Makkah — forgiveness and mercy of Prophet ﷺ

subject: islamic-studies
title: Character of Prophet ﷺ
description: His kindness, patience, honesty, humor, and mercy to all

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Adam a.s. — first human
description: Allah created Adam from clay and taught him all names

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Nuh a.s. — the ark
description: Nuh built the ark by Allah's command and saved the believers

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Ibrahim a.s. — friend of Allah
description: Ibrahim searched for Allah and destroyed idols — father of prophets

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Ismail a.s. — sacrifice
description: Ibrahim's willingness to sacrifice his son — lesson of obedience

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Lut a.s. — standing for truth
description: Lut warned his people against evil — lesson of courage

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Yusuf a.s. — patience and beauty
description: Yusuf's story: thrown in well, Egypt, patience, reunion with family

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Musa a.s. — birth in the river
description: Baby Musa in the basket, raised by Fir'awn, staff miracle

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Sulaiman a.s. — wisdom and kingdom
description: Sulaiman's kingdom, speaking with ants and birds, judgment

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Dawud a.s. — shepherd and king
description: Dawud's devotion, psalms (Zaboor), defeating Jalut

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Yunus a.s. — patience in darkness
description: Yunus swallowed by whale, his prayer from the darkness — repentance

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Isa a.s. — birth and miracles
description: Isa born to Maryam, miracles by Allah's permission, not divine

subject: islamic-studies
title: Prophet Ayyub a.s. — patience in suffering
description: Ayyub lost everything but never lost faith — Allah restored him

subject: islamic-studies
title: Cleanliness is half of faith
description: Learn that Allah loves cleanliness — washing hands, face, body

subject: islamic-studies
title: Wudu steps (ablution)
description: Learn the 6 steps of wudu: face, arms, head, ears, feet

subject: islamic-studies
title: When to make wudu
description: Before salah, after using toilet, after sleeping, after touching dogs

subject: islamic-studies
title: Allah wants us to pray
description: Learn that salah is a gift from Allah — talking to Him 5 times a day

subject: islamic-studies
title: Steps of Salah — standing
description: Learn the physical positions: standing (qiyam), hands on chest

subject: islamic-studies
title: Steps of Salah — bowing and prostrating
description: Learn ruku and sujud — the most important parts of salah

subject: islamic-studies
title: The 5 daily prayers
description: Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha — names and approximate times

subject: islamic-studies
title: Saying the Adhan
description: Learn the words of the adhan and its meaning

subject: islamic-studies
title: Praying in congregation
description: Learn to pray behind imam in the mosque — standing in rows

subject: islamic-studies
title: Fasting basics (Ramadan)
description: Learn why we fast, what breaks the fast, the reward of Ramadan

subject: islamic-studies
title: Complete salah with confidence
description: Pray all 5 daily prayers independently with correct recitation

subject: islamic-studies
title: Zakat and charity concepts
description: Learn about giving to those in need — the 2.5% rule, voluntary sadaqah

subject: islamic-studies
title: Hajj basics
description: Learn about the pilgrimage to Makkah — what pilgrims do and why

subject: islamic-studies
title: Bismillah before eating
description: Say Bismillah before every meal — thanking Allah for food

subject: islamic-studies
title: Alhamdulillah after eating
description: Say Alhamdulillah after finishing food

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua before sleep
description: Learn: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya — In Your name O Allah I die and live

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua when waking up
description: Learn: Alhamdulillahilladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana — praise to Allah who revived us

subject: islamic-studies
title: Entering the mosque
description: Learn: Allahumma aftah li abwaba rahmatik — O Allah open for me the doors of Your mercy

subject: islamic-studies
title: Leaving the mosque
description: Learn: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik — O Allah I ask You from Your bounty

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua when leaving home
description: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallah — In Allah's name I trust Allah

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua when entering home
description: Bismillahi walajna — In the name of Allah we enter

subject: islamic-studies
title: Morning adhkar (simplified)
description: Say key morning remembrances: Ayat al-Kursi, 3x Ikhlas/Falaq/Nas, Subhanallah 33x

subject: islamic-studies
title: Evening adhkar (simplified)
description: Say key evening remembrances — same as morning but at Maghrib time

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua when looking in mirror
description: Allahumma kama hassanta khalqi fahsin khuluqi — O Allah as You made my appearance beautiful, make my character beautiful

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua for parents
description: Rabbi irhamhuma kama rabbayani sagheera — My Lord have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small

subject: islamic-studies
title: Dua when traveling
description: Subhanalladhi sakhkhara lana hadha — Glorified is He who put this at our service

subject: islamic-studies
title: Complete morning/evening adhkar
description: Recite full set of morning and evening adhkar from memory

subject: islamic-studies
title: Saying please and thank you
description: Learn polite words: please, thank you, jazakAllahu khairan

subject: islamic-studies
title: Being kind to parents
description: Respect mom and dad — help them, speak gently, obey them

subject: islamic-studies
title: Saying Assalamu Alaikum
description: Greet people with Islamic greeting — to family, friends, strangers

subject: islamic-studies
title: Sharing with others
description: Learn to share toys, food, and time with siblings and friends

subject: islamic-studies
title: Telling the truth
description: Honesty is a sign of a believer — Prophet ﷺ was Al-Amin

subject: islamic-studies
title: Not interrupting others
description: Wait for your turn to speak — raise your hand or wait for a pause

subject: islamic-studies
title: Visiting the sick
description: Learn to visit sick family and neighbors — bring comfort and make dua

subject: islamic-studies
title: Feeding others
description: Prophet ﷺ said: the best of you is the one who feeds others

subject: islamic-studies
title: Being patient (Sabr)
description: When things are hard, say 'Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un' — be patient

subject: islamic-studies
title: Respecting elders
description: Stand for elders, speak respectfully, serve them food first

subject: islamic-studies
title: Animal rights in Islam
description: Prophet ﷺ said: whoever kills a sparrow for no reason will be questioned — be kind to animals

subject: islamic-studies
title: Neighbor rights
description: Prophet ﷺ said: Jibril kept reminding me about neighbor rights

subject: islamic-studies
title: Gratitude (Shukr)
description: Thank Allah in every situation — gratitude increases blessings

subject: english
title: Identifying beginning sounds
description: Listen and identify the first sound in simple words (cat = /c/)

subject: english
title: Identifying ending sounds
description: Listen and identify the last sound in simple words (dog = /g/)

subject: english
title: Rhyming words
description: Identify words that rhyme: cat/hat, dog/log, sun/run

subject: english
title: Blending sounds
description: Blend individual sounds: c-a-t → cat, d-o-g → dog

subject: english
title: Segmenting sounds
description: Break words into sounds: cat → /c/ /a/ /t/

subject: english
title: Middle sounds
description: Identify the vowel sound in the middle of CVC words

subject: english
title: Deleting sounds
description: Remove a sound: cat without /c/ = at

subject: english
title: Substituting sounds
description: Change a sound: cat → hat (change /c/ to /h/)

subject: english
title: Syllable clapping
description: Clap out syllables: but-ter-fly, el-e-phant

subject: english
title: Compound words
description: Combine two words: sun + flower = sunflower, ice + cream = ice cream

subject: english
title: Short vowel a: cat, hat, mat
description: Learn the short /a/ sound in CVC words

subject: english
title: Short vowel e: bed, pen, red
description: Learn the short /e/ sound in CVC words

subject: english
title: Short vowel i: sit, big, pin
description: Learn the short /i/ sound in CVC words

subject: english
title: Short vowel o: hot, dog, pot
description: Learn the short /o/ sound in CVC words

subject: english
title: Short vowel u: cup, run, fun
description: Learn the short /u/ sound in CVC words

subject: english
title: Consonant blends: bl, cl, fl, gl
description: Read and write words with beginning blends: block, clap, flag, glad

subject: english
title: Consonant blends: br, cr, dr, fr
description: Read words: brown, crab, drum, frog

subject: english
title: Consonant blends: st, sp, sk, sm
description: Read words: stop, spin, skip, smile

subject: english
title: Digraphs: sh, ch, th
description: Learn special sound pairs: ship, chat, this

subject: english
title: Digraphs: wh, ph, ng, nk
description: Learn: when, phone, ring, sink

subject: english
title: Long vowel a: cake, make, lake
description: Learn the magic-e rule: silent e makes vowel long

subject: english
title: Long vowel i: bike, kite, time
description: Magic-e with i: i_e makes long /i/ sound

subject: english
title: Long vowel o: bone, home, rose
description: Magic-e with o: o_e makes long /o/ sound

subject: english
title: Long vowel u: cute, tube, fuse
description: Magic-e with u: u_e makes long /u/ sound

subject: english
title: Vowel teams: ai, ay (long a)
description: Read: rain, play, train, day

subject: english
title: Vowel teams: ea, ee (long e)
description: Read: tea, tree, read, see

subject: english
title: Vowel teams: oa, oe (long o)
description: Read: boat, coat, toe, hoe

subject: english
title: R-controlled vowels: ar, er, ir, or, ur
description: Learn: car, her, bird, for, burn

subject: english
title: Diphthongs: oi, oy, ou, ow
description: Learn: coin, boy, out, cow

subject: english
title: Silent letters: kn, wr, gn, mb
description: Learn: know, write, gnaw, lamb

subject: english
title: Soft c and soft g
description: c makes /s/ before e,i,y (city, center); g makes /j/ (gem, gym)

subject: english
title: Multisyllable decoding
description: Break long words into syllables to read: but-ter-flies, el-e-phant

subject: english
title: Irregular/sight word reading
description: Read common irregular words: the, said, was, would, could, should

subject: english
title: Pre-primer sight words (10)
description: the, a, I, is, it, to, and, in, we, see

subject: english
title: Primer sight words (20)
description: can, you, he, she, my, like, go, do, at, he, was, for, on, are, as, with, his, they, I, said

subject: english
title: First grade sight words (20)
description: have, come, some, what, when, where, which, who, how, many, each, every, little, much, very, its, our, their, would, could

subject: english
title: Second grade sight words (20)
description: been, before, after, again, also, always, because, been, both, does, don't, every, first, goes, great, just, know, laugh, never, only

subject: english
title: Picture reading
description: Look at pictures to tell what a story is about

subject: english
title: Reading CVC words independently
description: Read simple 3-letter words: cat, dog, pen, sun, bus

subject: english
title: Reading simple sentences
description: Read 3-4 word sentences: 'The cat sat.' 'I can run.'

subject: english
title: Story elements
description: Identify characters, setting, beginning, middle, end in stories

subject: english
title: Retelling stories
description: Retell a story in correct sequence using transition words

subject: english
title: Making predictions
description: Look at cover and title, predict what the book is about before reading

subject: english
title: Answering who, what, where, when, why
description: Answer comprehension questions after reading a passage

subject: english
title: Main idea and details
description: Identify the main idea and supporting details in a text

subject: english
title: Cause and effect
description: Identify cause and effect relationships in stories

subject: english
title: Reading short chapters
description: Read short chapter books independently with comprehension

subject: english
title: Author's purpose
description: Understand why an author writes: to entertain, inform, or persuade

subject: english
title: Compare and contrast
description: Compare characters, settings, or events across two stories

subject: english
title: Scribbling with crayons
description: Hold crayon and make marks on paper — early writing exposure

subject: english
title: Tracing vertical and horizontal lines
description: Practice drawing straight lines (top to bottom, left to right)

subject: english
title: Tracing shapes
description: Trace circles, squares, triangles, and zigzag lines

subject: english
title: Copying simple shapes
description: Copy: circle, cross, square, triangle without tracing

subject: english
title: Writing own name
description: Write first name with correct letter formation and size

subject: english
title: Labeling pictures
description: Write labels for pictures: cat, dog, sun, house

subject: english
title: Writing simple sentences
description: Write 3-5 word sentences independently: 'I like cats.'

subject: english
title: Capital letters and periods
description: Use capital at start and period at end of every sentence

subject: english
title: Writing a paragraph
description: Write 3-5 sentences about a topic with a beginning, middle, end

subject: english
title: Question marks and exclamation marks
description: Use ? for questions and ! for excitement — learn when to use each

subject: english
title: Creative writing
description: Write short stories, journal entries, and descriptive paragraphs

subject: english
title: Letter writing
description: Write a friendly letter: greeting, body, closing, signature

subject: english
title: Writing complete sentences
description: Use subject + verb + object; avoid fragments and run-ons

subject: english
title: Naming words (nouns)
description: Learn that naming words are people, places, or things

subject: english
title: Action words (verbs)
description: Learn that verbs are doing words: run, jump, eat, sleep

subject: english
title: Describing words (adjectives)
description: Learn that adjectives describe nouns: big dog, red ball

subject: english
title: Singular and plural nouns
description: cat → cats, baby → babies, foot → feet — rules for making plurals

subject: english
title: A and an articles
description: Use 'a' before consonant sounds, 'an' before vowel sounds

subject: english
title: Pronouns: I, you, he, she, it, we, they
description: Replace nouns with pronouns to avoid repetition

subject: english
title: Sentence parts: subject and predicate
description: Every sentence has who/what (subject) and does what (predicate)

subject: english
title: Present, past, and future tense
description: walk/walked/will walk — learn to change verb tenses

subject: english
title: Conjunctions: and, but, or, so
description: Join two sentences: 'I like cats and dogs.' 'I wanted to go but it rained.'

subject: english
title: Board books and touch-and-feel
description: Explore sturdy books with textures — develop love of books

subject: english
title: Read-aloud time
description: Listen to short stories being read aloud — develop attention span

subject: english
title: Fairy tales and fables
description: Classic tales: Three Little Pigs, Goldilocks, Lion and Mouse

subject: english
title: Identifying story characters
description: Name the main characters and what they look like

subject: english
title: Poetry: nursery rhymes
description: Recite and memorize nursery rhymes: Twinkle Twinkle, Baa Baa Black Sheep

subject: english
title: Folk tales from different cultures
description: Read stories from African, Asian, Middle Eastern, and European traditions

subject: english
title: Identifying the moral/lesson
description: After reading, identify what the story teaches us

subject: english
title: Fiction vs non-fiction
description: Distinguish between make-believe stories and factual books

subject: english
title: Character feelings and motivations
description: Discuss why characters did what they did and how they felt

subject: english
title: Chapter book reading
description: Read and discuss simple chapter books independently

subject: english
title: Writing book reports
description: Write a short summary: title, author, characters, favorite part, recommendation

subject: mathematics
title: Counting objects 1-5
description: Touch and count fingers, toes, toys — one-to-one correspondence

subject: mathematics
title: Rote counting 1-10
description: Sing counting songs and rote count to 10

subject: mathematics
title: Recognizing numerals 1-5
description: Match numeral to quantity: see '3' and show 3 fingers

subject: mathematics
title: Rote counting 1-20
description: Count to 20 with accuracy

subject: mathematics
title: Recognizing numerals 1-10
description: Identify all digits 0-9 and order them

subject: mathematics
title: Counting objects 1-20
description: Count groups of objects up to 20

subject: mathematics
title: Comparing numbers
description: Which is more? Which is less? Greater than, less than, equal

subject: mathematics
title: Number order
description: Put numbers 1-20 in order

subject: mathematics
title: Skip counting by 2s
description: Count: 2, 4, 6, 8, 10... using pairs

subject: mathematics
title: Skip counting by 5s
description: Count: 5, 10, 15, 20... using hands

subject: mathematics
title: Recognizing numerals 1-20
description: Read and write all numerals 1-20

subject: mathematics
title: Counting to 100
description: Count accurately to 100 by 1s

subject: mathematics
title: Place value: tens and ones
description: Understand that 23 = 2 tens + 3 ones using base-10 blocks

subject: mathematics
title: Reading and writing numbers to 100
description: Read numerals 0-100 and write them from dictation

subject: mathematics
title: Comparing numbers to 100
description: Use >, <, = to compare two-digit numbers

subject: mathematics
title: Place value: hundreds, tens, ones
description: Understand 3-digit numbers: 456 = 4 hundreds + 5 tens + 6 ones

subject: mathematics
title: Counting to 1000
description: Count by 1s, 10s, and 100s to 1000

subject: mathematics
title: Number patterns
description: Identify and extend number patterns: +2, +5, +10 sequences

subject: mathematics
title: Adding 1 to a number
description: Learn that adding 1 gives the next number: 3+1=4

subject: mathematics
title: Combining two groups
description: Put 2 objects and 3 objects together = 5 total

subject: mathematics
title: Addition within 10
description: Add two numbers whose sum is ≤10: 3+4=7

subject: mathematics
title: Subtraction within 10
description: Take away objects: 7-3=4 — understand removal

subject: mathematics
title: Addition within 20 (no regrouping)
description: Add single-digit numbers: 8+5=13

subject: mathematics
title: Addition within 20 (with regrouping)
description: Add with carrying: 9+6=15, 8+7=15

subject: mathematics
title: Subtraction within 20
description: Subtract single-digit from teen: 15-7=8

subject: mathematics
title: Understanding equals sign
description: The = sign means 'the same as' — both sides are equal

subject: mathematics
title: Addition within 100
description: Add two-digit numbers with regrouping: 34+27=61

subject: mathematics
title: Subtraction within 100
description: Subtract two-digit numbers with regrouping: 52-18=34

subject: mathematics
title: Word problems (addition)
description: Solve word problems: 'Ali had 5 apples and got 3 more. How many?

subject: mathematics
title: Word problems (subtraction)
description: Solve: 'Maryam had 12 cookies and ate 4. How many left?

subject: mathematics
title: Patterns: growing patterns
description: Extend growing patterns: 1, 2, 4, 7, 11 (+1, +2, +3, +4)

subject: mathematics
title: Patterns: repeating patterns
description: Identify and create AB, ABB, ABC, AABBCC patterns

subject: mathematics
title: Circles
description: Identify and describe a circle — round, no corners

subject: mathematics
title: Squares
description: Identify and describe a square — 4 equal sides, 4 corners

subject: mathematics
title: Triangles
description: Identify and describe a triangle — 3 sides, 3 corners

subject: mathematics
title: Rectangles
description: Identify and describe a rectangle — 4 sides, 2 long and 2 short

subject: mathematics
title: Hexagons and ovals
description: Identify hexagon (6 sides) and oval (elongated circle)

subject: mathematics
title: Sorting by shape
description: Sort objects into groups by their shape

subject: mathematics
title: 3D shapes: cube, sphere, cone, cylinder
description: Identify basic 3D shapes and their flat surfaces

subject: mathematics
title: Position words
description: Above, below, beside, between, in front of, behind

subject: mathematics
title: Symmetry
description: Fold a shape in half — are both sides the same? Mirror line

subject: mathematics
title: Halves and fourths (fractions intro)
description: Fold paper in half and fourths — understand equal parts

subject: mathematics
title: Composing shapes
description: Combine two shapes to make a new shape: 2 triangles = square

subject: mathematics
title: Identifying angles
description: Right angle (corner), acute (small), obtuse (big)

subject: mathematics
title: Area introduction
description: Cover a shape with unit squares — how many fit inside?

subject: mathematics
title: Big and small
description: Compare object sizes: which is bigger, which is smaller?

subject: mathematics
title: Long and short
description: Compare lengths: which is longer, which is shorter?

subject: mathematics
title: Heavy and light
description: Compare weight using a balance scale

subject: mathematics
title: Measuring with non-standard units
description: Measure length using paper clips, blocks, hand spans

subject: mathematics
title: Tall and short
description: Compare heights — who is tallest?

subject: mathematics
title: Inches and centimeters
description: Introduction to standard units of length

subject: mathematics
title: Pounds and kilograms
description: Introduction to weight units

subject: mathematics
title: Cups and liters
description: Introduction to volume/capacity

subject: mathematics
title: Reading a ruler (inches)
description: Measure objects to the nearest inch using a ruler

subject: mathematics
title: Reading a ruler (centimeters)
description: Measure objects to the nearest centimeter

subject: mathematics
title: Graphing: tally marks
description: Record data using tally marks

subject: mathematics
title: Bar graphs
description: Read and create simple bar graphs from data

subject: mathematics
title: Calendar skills
description: Read a calendar: days of week, months, today's date

subject: mathematics
title: Time: o'clock
description: Tell time to the hour on analog clock

subject: mathematics
title: Time: half past
description: Tell time to the half hour: half past 3, half past 7

subject: mathematics
title: Coin recognition: penny, nickel, dime, quarter
description: Identify US coins by appearance and value

subject: mathematics
title: Counting coins
description: Count pennies, then add nickels, dimes: total value

subject: mathematics
title: Bill recognition: $1, $5, $10
description: Identify paper money and their values

subject: mathematics
title: Making change
description: Calculate change from simple purchases

subject: mathematics
title: Adding money amounts
description: Add different coins and bills to make a total

subject: mathematics
title: Coins of Saudi Arabia ( Riyal)
description: Learn about the most common Saudi coins

subject: mathematics
title: Color patterns: red, blue, red, blue
description: Continue simple alternating color patterns

subject: mathematics
title: Size patterns: big, small, big, small
description: Continue patterns based on size

subject: mathematics
title: Shape patterns
description: Continue patterns with different shapes

subject: mathematics
title: Growing patterns
description: 1, 2, 3, 4... 2, 4, 6, 8... patterns that increase

subject: mathematics
title: Sorting and classifying
description: Sort objects by multiple attributes: color AND shape

subject: mathematics
title: Logic puzzles
description: Simple logic: if this, then that — process of elimination

subject: mathematics
title: Number patterns and rules
description: Find the rule in a number pattern and extend it
